name: Sales Command Center (v2)
description: Executive sales command center — period-over-period overview, customer 360, and single-store performance.

elements.body: ## **COSTCO WHOLESALE — Sales Command Center** *Revenue, profitability, and momentum across every warehouse.*
## **Customer 360** *Pick a customer and explore their end-to-end purchase footprint.*
## **Store Performance** *Pick one store and dig into its metrics.*

layout:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Page type="grid" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto" id="page-overview">
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-hero" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="txt-hero-title" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-filter-bar" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="6 / 11" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-ov-date" gridColumn="1 / 7" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-ov-region" gridColumn="7 / 13" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-ov-grain" gridColumn="13 / 19" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-ov-ptype" gridColumn="19 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-kpi-row" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="11 / 21" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-ov-revenue" gridColumn="1 / 7" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-ov-profit" gridColumn="7 / 13" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-ov-aov" gridColumn="13 / 19" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-ov-cust" gridColumn="19 / 25" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-trends" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="21 / 45" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="chart-rev-trend" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 13"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="chart-rev-by-region" gridColumn="1 / 13" gridRow="13 / 25"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="chart-prod-mix" gridColumn="13 / 25" gridRow="13 / 25"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <LayoutElement elementId="chart-top-stores" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="45 / 57"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="tbl-tx" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="57 / 65"/>
</Page>
<Page type="grid" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto" id="page-cust360">
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-c360-hero" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="txt-c360-title" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-c360-filters" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="6 / 11" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-c360-cust" gridColumn="1 / 9" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-c360-date" gridColumn="9 / 17" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-c360-ptype" gridColumn="17 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-c360-kpis" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="11 / 21" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-c360-ltr" gridColumn="1 / 7" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-c360-orders" gridColumn="7 / 13" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-c360-aov" gridColumn="13 / 19" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-c360-units" gridColumn="19 / 25" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <LayoutElement elementId="chart-c360-timeline" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="21 / 33"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="chart-c360-ptype" gridColumn="1 / 13" gridRow="33 / 45"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="chart-c360-stores" gridColumn="13 / 25" gridRow="33 / 45"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="tbl-c360-detail" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="45 / 57"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="tbl-cust-tx" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="57 / 65"/>
</Page>
<Page type="grid" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto" id="page-store">
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-st-hero" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="txt-st-title" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-st-filters" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="6 / 11" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-st-store" gridColumn="1 / 9" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-st-date" gridColumn="9 / 17" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="ctrl-st-ptype" gridColumn="17 / 25" gridRow="1 / 6"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <GridContainer elementId="ctr-st-kpis" type="grid" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="11 / 21" gridTemplateColumns="repeat(24, 1fr)" gridTemplateRows="auto">
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-st-revenue" gridColumn="1 / 7" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-st-profit" gridColumn="7 / 13" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-st-margin" gridColumn="13 / 19" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
    <LayoutElement elementId="kpi-st-customers" gridColumn="19 / 25" gridRow="1 / 11"/>
  </GridContainer>
  <LayoutElement elementId="chart-st-trend" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="21 / 33"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="chart-st-mix" gridColumn="1 / 13" gridRow="33 / 45"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="chart-st-top-prods" gridColumn="13 / 25" gridRow="33 / 45"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="tbl-st-detail" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="45 / 57"/>
  <LayoutElement elementId="tbl-store-tx" gridColumn="1 / 25" gridRow="57 / 65"/>
</Page>
